ignored_warnings.note: SendFile Medium — app/controllers/api/v1/assets_controller.rb:712. The storage_path is a DB-stored value, but the path is already resolved via File.expand_path and validated to stay within storage/dam/ before reaching send_file. Accepted risk.

FileAccess Weak — app/controllers/api/v1/assets_controller.rb:180. The original_filename is sanitised with File.basename + gsub(/[^\w.\-]/, '_') and the path is scoped under tmp/uploads/<uuid>_v1_<safe_name>. Accepted risk.
SendFile Weak — app/controllers/api/v1/assets_controller.rb:710. Same path-validation guard (File.expand_path / storage_root check) applies before this line. Accepted risk.

PermitAttributes Medium — admin/users_controller.rb:368. user_group_ids is an intentional many-to-many assignment for group membership management in the admin panel. The :admin key is handled explicitly outside user_params with role/ownership guards.
